ddls:
CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the college the department belongs to */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject area of the course */,
  "course_number" INTEGER /* The course number */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* The name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the course content */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* The number of credit hours the course is worth */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department that offers the course */,
  "general_education" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course fulfills general education requirements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_code" TEXT /* The code representing the subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* The name of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* The name of the term (e.g., Fall, Spring, Summer) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the term */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* The start date of registration for the term */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* The end date of registration for the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course this section belongs to */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the term during which this section is offered */,
  "section_number" TEXT /* The section number (e.g., AD1, AD2) */,
  "section_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the section */,
  "section_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the section */,
  "section_attributes" TEXT /* Attributes or flags for the section (e.g., honors, online) */,
  "section_capp_area" TEXT /* CAPP area fulfilled by the section */,
  "section_co_request" TEXT /* Co-requisite courses for the section */,
  "section_special_approval" TEXT /* Special approval requirements for the section */,
  "part_of_term" INTEGER /* Part of term indicator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the section */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the section */,
  "meeting" INTEGER /* Meeting pattern (e.g., MWF, TR) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of section (e.g., lecture, discussion) */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the section type */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the section */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the section */,
  "days" TEXT /* Days of the week the section meets */,
  "room" TEXT /* Room number where the section meets */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the section meets */,
  "instructor" TEXT /* Name of the instructor teaching the section */,
  "enrollment_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building where the room is located */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* The room number */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* The capacity of the room */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific section the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade the student received in the course */,
  "attendance" REAL /* Average attendance of the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major or program of study for the student */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date the student is expected to graduate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course that has the prerequisite */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course that is a prerequisite for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting pattern */,
  "pattern_name" TEXT /* Name of the meeting pattern */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the meeting pattern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "section_attributes" (
  "section_attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section attribute */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the section that has the attribute */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the attribute associated with the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_section_attributes_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES course_attributes ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_section_attributes_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course evaluation */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course being evaluated */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the section being evaluated */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student submitting the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructor_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor evaluation */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor being evaluated */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course being evaluated */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the section being evaluated */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student submitting the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructor_evaluations_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructor_evaluations_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructor_evaluations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructor_evaluations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
